title: Ubiquiti UMR - UniFi LTE WiFi router
description: UniFi Mobile Router is a compact device with wide power options, two LAN ports, WiFi and LTE Cat4 modem One of the pair of gigabit ethernets also supports the PoE-out function (if the router is powered via POE+ / 802.at). Other power options are via a USB-C connector or a 4-pin connector. The router can be mounted directly on the wall with the included bracket or on a DIN rail using an additional intermediate piece, which is also included in the package. You can connect wirelessly at a frequency 2.4GHz with a maximum line speed 150Mbps . The LTE modem reaches category 4, which means speeds up to… GPS and WiFi antennas are integrated inside the router, LTE antennas are detachable, the SIM slot is hidden under the antennas. The maximum consumption of the device itself is 9W The device is managed locally via a web interface, and the manufacturer also offers remote management through the UniFi Mobility Manager portal, which is, however, subject to a fee Device DIN rail Wall mount bracket DIN mount bracket (4) Screws and anchors LTE antennas USB-C power adapter
specsSearch: Wireless features WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 150 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 8640 Type of antenna Built-in, Detachable Internal antennas 2 Detachable antennas 2 Integrated 4G/LTE radio part Yes 4G/LTE bands support (1) 2100 MHz, (3) 1800 MHz, (7) 2600 MHz, (8) 900 MHz, (20) 800 MHz, (28) 700 MHz Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 1 GPS modul Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In Max. power consumption [W] 9 Power via connector/terminal 9V / 1A Physical characteristics Design On the wall, DIN rail Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 20 up to 45 Weight [g] 303 Width [mm] 90 Height [mm] 29 Depth [mm] 221 Hardware CPU MIPS 74Kc CPU frequency [MHz] 775 RAM [MB] 128
